h7f350ee5g7ff7g4eb5g98eag2b2b2ff88b67: Something tells me I know what you two were talking about. Both feeling better than you did last night, yes?
hc01e5e98g4579g4bfbg8c1cg826ecbb4b26e: Not even just that: I awoke with new... I don't know... powers?
heaf97e9cg5a34g459dga951g74dde4d086d3: It was the same for you, wasn't it? The good health, the power, the dreams?
h0bf66f8bg7ed0g4c9egac30ga577dce93946: I don't need to worm my way into your thoughts to know that - it's all over your face.
h865f29c0gffd2g4c5eg9c6cg0a8aeef2a31e: Is it that obvious...? Yes, I had a dream. A rather vivid one.
hd7048deag6b71g4c04g915fgf30e6a31f116: I dreamt of someone I'm very attracted to. There was a promise of power.
h1e4b9705g70b3g4493ga876g1c5ba9f05270: I had exactly the same dream when aboard the mind flayer ship.
hd0a5e5c4gb0a3g4137g9ee1g008d4f90685a: I rebuffed the advances, of course.
h881c9d33gefeag488bgbeacgb5a64c0e9ded: If it happens again, try to resist.
h414e562bg00a5g469egbe84gc99644c80f0b: We can't take anything for granted, especially when it's to do with what's going on up here.
h3e2edfb7g3f19g4169gb850g1a4a135fe3c2: There's nothing strange about having a dream - why do you care?
ha3bb5ebeg3f44g4c45gafabgec5fde4adb95: Because I think you and I had much the same dream. That's strange.
h2fbd0511g464cg4ceag8b88gfa1b48a2a387: It's all right, you can trust me. Tell me what you saw - what you felt.
he8e12644gc28cg430agb8bfgc0713c53f9a4: Is it that obvious...? Yes, I had a dream. A rather vivid one.
h2560a53dg4ba1g40fdga5b2g844d31dfd35f: What were they like? Whoever came to you, in the dream?
hd5014469gfd0eg4a9cga220gdb2322e8bc9e: Tell her what you experienced. Keep nothing back.
ha44c32dag75fdg4a49g9f80g97a2ca2bbef2: Different from mine in some ways... but the same in all the senses that matter.
h49020d83g1019g4e05g97a3g35f11c388fc0: Suspicious is putting it very mildly. We need to be careful until we know more.
hf78afa13g9b04g40a7g987bg10e93c264b42: I'm glad we're of the same mind. If this happens again, let me know.
h45215913g24feg4294gba06g41296fcce599: Hunting for meaning in dreams is for fools.
h918b3f10gf2dbg4044gb89egd50a041d9bee: ... and parasites that turn you into a monster are tales to frighten children, I suppose?
h17d576ceg18b0g4f25ga1fcgdf626d930cbb: It could be that devil, Raphael.
hf6dc2d77g08bdg41f6gb38ag35bd166aa9b2: I'm not sure. This didn't feel like him.
h4dc7e78bgf878g4a8dg840eg8ff4001baf62: I had the same dream aboard the mind flayer ship.
hcfff4512gba3fg45e8gb1a8g51a2dd57f6fc: What did you do, in your dream?
h77bdaaf5g44eeg40deg8c69g60cf8016399a: The same, of course. I wasn't about to give in to a dream.
he7e3cf4dg75dcg45f1gb9f7g5065e62255ca: I believe you. But it can't have been easy - my dream was... vivid.
hd9cc1723g3fcdg4816ga652g822d464d424c: I'll admit it - I was tempted. I might have given in, had I not awoken.
h366403a5g53dcg4fb9g86abga81a6a2ca7b3: I suppose I can't expect everyone to show the same discipline. But you must try to resist.
h46852b29g4627g4b62ga21eg5fa716715d99: Forget it - we've dwelt too long on this nonsense already. There's real issues to deal with.
ha22fde72ga74fg41c8ga3c0g2a4323c9c674: It felt real to me. Too real. If it happens again, try to resist.
h3093a9efge3edg4bbdgbbfdg8b6b9a6d2666: This could just be a coincidence, you know. Far stranger things have happened.
hd70565b9g1910g4a2agbf35g330eb3bdc923: A coincidence? Really? Your capacity for turning a blind eye is quite astonishing.
h6854793cg4fb2g407cgb156gccd259d3a6fa: What makes you think anyone else was in my dream?
hb2586a95ga3c4g4c7dgb6f0g94bc32dc326f: Well. I sincerely doubt you'd be moaning like that if you were dreaming about a sunny meadow or your favourite cut of pork.
h9b0e3da0g88a9g4abag97a8g923bd49d22ab: You had the same type of dream I had.
h46e45c20g2fc8g4cb5gaee0gf8443caac314: Tell me about your dream, if you're so keen on the subject.
hc214e22agdebbg4ed4ga6dbgf1b827236a00: I asked first. Please, this isn't the time to be bashful.
h25e4e8c1gc739g4a8egaf22gcf2ad7291a1e: Let me guess - someone very appealing came to you. Offered themselves to you.
h483e0f2cg0222g4b6dg95ecgf78aff27c814: Don't worry, exhale. I'm not looking to judge your taste. But still, this is troubling.
h225d5306gc1c7g4ca1ga52cgdcc4fd1a61ad: The last time I had a dream like this was in my pod on the mind flayer ship.
hea66e065gfb41g4094gafd1gf195f1cb08b2: I'm telling you - I don't know what you mean.
hd58ea816gdefbg49faga656g6f20e3eb4380: Please, don't be tiresome. I can get the information I need whether you offer it willingly or not.
h62ea562egdbccg4653g9b5dg228478f4b852: It was you. I saw you in my dream.
hee3a2ec6ga6e8g41acgb834gcf1bdba0b31b: Huh...At least you have good taste.
h12f7ea83g1923g4b91ga9a8g3e8e8bb79af1: I dreamt of someone I am very attracted to. And no, it wasn't you. There was a promise of power.
h30990b47gd8b6g402ag889bgdb444d7d7b1c: There's nothing strange about having a dream - why do you care?
h9fecf9edg6a60g4050gaa88ga22f15a66ff0: What was your visitor like? Whoever came to you?
h7502f4cdg969fg4880gac33g7e8b15093498: I'm glad you're feeling better, but otherwise I haven't a clue what you're going on about.
hfce8ec0fgcb6fg48ddgb5b2g968e14c70f96: No, you do. I heard you moaning just before you woke.
h690a63e0g4d12g4db3g9d29g019f0de7afed: I don't understand. My kind don't dream like this unless they choose to, and I didn't choose.
hcd91457cg018bg47e0gaa6eg4db8fc890c59: No, someone else chose for you. Or something else.
h7733987cgbe8dg45d6g80aag9de575e1eefc: I feel much better than I did yesterday... amazing what a night's sleep can do, isn't it?
